pandas>=2.2.3
numpy>=2.1.0,<2.5.0
# pyarrow: pinned to >=23.0.1 to address CVE-2026-25087 / GHSA-rgxp-2hwp-jwgg
# (use-after-free in Apache Arrow C++ IPC file pre-buffering). The Python
# bindings don't expose the vulnerable C++ API, but the lower bound keeps
# fresh installs from pulling a vulnerable C++ wheel.
pyarrow>=23.0.1

# Vector store / embeddings
chromadb>=0.5.0
fastembed>=0.5.0,<1.0.0
langchain-chroma>=1.1.0,<2.0.0

# Retry logic for external APIs
backoff>=2.2.0
# langchain-community 0.4.2 moved ChatOllama out of
# langchain_community.chat_models into the standalone
# langchain-ollama package — see v5.0.7 release notes.
langchain-community>=0.4.1,<1.0.0
langchain-ollama>=1.1.0,<2.0.0

# LangChain core and providers (aligned to core 1.x)
langchain>=1.3.9,<2.0.0
langchain-core>=1.4.8,<2.0.0
langchain-openai>=1.2.2,<2.0.0
langchain-anthropic>=1.4.3,<2.0.0
langchain-google-genai>=4.2.5,<5.0.0

# Provider SDKs
openai>=1.55.0
anthropic>=0.40.0
google-generativeai>=0.8.0

# Tokenization / compression
tiktoken>=0.13.0
zstandard>=0.23.0
grpcio>=1.80.0
# protobuf is capped at <6.0.0 because google-ai-generativelanguage 0.6.x
# (transitive via google-generativeai 0.8.x → langchain-google-genai 4.x)
# requires protobuf<6.0.0. Bumping the lower bound to 7+ (or widening
# the upper bound) breaks `uv pip install` with "unsatisfiable
# requirements" — see commit 245885a (v5.0.6) for the original
# incident. The narrow lower bound 5.27.0 also keeps grpcio 1.80+,
# onnxruntime 1.19+, and fastembed 0.5+ happy.
# Run `make check-deps` before tagging a release to catch drift.
protobuf>=5.27.0,<6.0.0

aiohttp>=3.14.1

# Config / typing
pydantic>=2.10.0
pydantic-settings>=2.14.2
typing-extensions>=4.12.0
typing-inspection>=0.4.2

# Security tools
pre-commit>=4.3.0
detect-secrets>=1.5.0
bandit>=1.7.6
pip-audit>=2.7.3
cryptography>=43.0.0

# Utilities
requests>=2.34.2
types-requests>=2.33.0.20260518  # Type stubs for mypy
regex>=2026.5.9
rpds-py>=2026.5.1
onnxruntime>=1.27.0
yarl>=1.17.0
faker>=27.0.0
reportlab>=4.2.0
rank_bm25>=0.2.2
openpyxl>=3.1.0
tabulate>=0.9.0

# Excel file support (beyond openpyxl)
odfpy>=1.4.1  # For .ods file support
xlrd>=2.0.1  # For .xls file support (legacy)

# API
fastapi>=0.119.0
uvicorn>=0.30.0
python-multipart>=0.0.29
email-validator>=2.1.0

# Authentication
sqlalchemy>=2.0.0
aiosqlite>=0.19.0
asyncpg>=0.29.0  # Async PostgreSQL driver for production deployments
alembic>=1.18.4  # Database migrations
pyjwt>=2.13.0
passlib[bcrypt]>=1.7.4
authlib>=1.6.12
httpx>=0.27.0,<1.0.0
jinja2>=3.1.0

# Document Management - OCR dependencies (Task #43)
python-docx>=1.1.2  # For DOCX text extraction
pytesseract>=0.3.13  # OCR engine wrapper
pdf2image>=1.17.0  # PDF to image conversion
Pillow>=12.2.0  # Image processing (fastembed pins pillow<12.3)

# Security patches for transitive dependencies
urllib3>=2.7.0  # fastembed pins urllib3<2.8
GitPython>=3.1.50  # CVE-2024-22190: RCE via config_writer (latest available)
pyasn1>=0.6.3  # latest available (CVE-2024-xxx DoS mitigated)
orjson>=3.11.9
